raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"The request to make the draft stronger centrally implicates sharpening the thesis, gap, and contribution claim above the sentence level.","R1.2":"Strengthening the passage requires checking whether the methodological premise, evaluation result, and claimed contribution form a coherent argument chain.","R1.3":"Because the artifact makes performance and generalization claims, responsibility includes aligning those claims with the reported evaluation evidence.","R1.5":"Improving strength may require adjusting the paragraph- and section-level narrative arc around problem, method, evidence, and contribution.","R1.6":"The broad request naturally includes sentence- and paragraph-level improvements in clarity, concision, and scholarly register.","RX.1":"Uncertainty should be disclosed around empirical scope, model behavior, and unsupported generalization from the reported results.","RX.2":"The clinical and novelty claims make avoiding overstatement a load-bearing responsibility.","RX.3":"The projection must stay within strengthening the paper draft rather than performing external validation or executing the proposed research.","RX.4":"Because the domain is clinical variant interpretation, downstream harms from inflated claims or unsafe implications must be considered.","RX.5":"Claims about datasets, evidence sources, code, prompts, and reproducibility should remain traceable to stated provenance."}}

rationale.R1.1: The request to make the draft stronger centrally implicates sharpening the thesis, gap, and contribution claim above the sentence level.
rationale.R1.2: Strengthening the passage requires checking whether the methodological premise, evaluation result, and claimed contribution form a coherent argument chain.
rationale.R1.3: Because the artifact makes performance and generalization claims, responsibility includes aligning those claims with the reported evaluation evidence.
rationale.R1.5: Improving strength may require adjusting the paragraph- and section-level narrative arc around problem, method, evidence, and contribution.
rationale.R1.6: The broad request naturally includes sentence- and paragraph-level improvements in clarity, concision, and scholarly register.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty should be disclosed around empirical scope, model behavior, and unsupported generalization from the reported results.
rationale.RX.2: The clinical and novelty claims make avoiding overstatement a load-bearing responsibility.
rationale.RX.3: The projection must stay within strengthening the paper draft rather than performing external validation or executing the proposed research.
rationale.RX.4: Because the domain is clinical variant interpretation, downstream harms from inflated claims or unsafe implications must be considered.
rationale.RX.5: Claims about datasets, evidence sources, code, prompts, and reproducibility should remain traceable to stated provenance.
